positive: A minimalist, stylized woodland creature portrait featuring a majestic fox nestled among abstract, geometric foliage and bioluminescent mushrooms. The fox should be rendered with clean, graphic outlines and rich, earthy tones (burnt orange, deep moss green, sapphire blue). Composition must be central and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print. Focus on high contrast silhouettes and flat color blocking with subtle gradients for depth. Studio-lit, graphic novel style, vector illustration aesthetic, highly detailed, smooth, commercial print quality.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, text, signature, watermark, dirty, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, ugly, abstract, photo, realistic, cropped
